mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, CASE WHEN s.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as is_fav, -- u.TARGET_ID가 존재하면 'Y', 아니면 'N' CASE WHEN u.TARGET_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END as is_ing,
MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE = '필기' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END) AS deadline_written, TRUNC(MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE = '필기' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END)) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS d_day_written,
MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE LIKE '실기%' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END) AS deadline_practical, TRUNC(MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE LIKE '실기%' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END)) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS d_day_practical
FROM CERTIFICATION c LEFT OUTER JOIN SAVED_ITEM s ON c.CERTI_ID = s.TARGET_ID AND s.USER_ID = #{param1} AND s.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' -- [핵심 수정 부분] 조인 조건에 유저 아이디를 정확히 매칭 LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_ING u ON c.CERTI_ID = u.TARGET_ID AND u.USER_ID = #{param1} AND u.TARGET_TYPE = 'CERTI' LEFT JOIN EXAM_SCHEDULE e ON c.CERTI_NAME = e.CERT_ID AND e.REG_END_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY c.CERTI_ID, c.CERTI_NAME, c.ORGANIZER, c.IS_REGULAR, c.CERTI_TYPE, c.MAIN_CATEGORY, c.SUB_CATEGORY, c.URL, s.TARGET_ID, u.TARGET_ID -- 이 u.TARGET_ID가 GROUP BY에 꼭 있어야 함
/* 시험 접수 마감일 임박순 정렬 */ ORDER BY LEAST( MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE = '필기' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END), MIN(CASE WHEN e.EXAM_TYPE LIKE '실기%' THEN e.REG_END_DATE END) ) ASC NULLS LAST
SELECT CERTI_TYPE as CERTI_TYPE, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM CERTIFICATION GROUP BY CERTI_TYPE ORDER BY CERTI_TYPE ASC
SELECT DISTINCT CERTI_TYPE FROM CERTIFICATION ORDER BY CERTI_TYPE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SAVED_ITEM (SAVED_ID, USER_ID, TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE) VALUES (SAVED_ITEM_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM SAVED_ITEM WHERE USER_ID = #{param1} AND TARGET_ID = #{param2} AND TARGET_TYPE = #{param3}
mapper.select: SELECT c.certi_id, c.certi_name, COUNT(s.saved_id) FROM saved_item s JOIN certification c ON s.target_id = c.certi_id WHERE s.target_type = 'CERTI' GROUP BY c.certi_id, c.certi_name ORDER BY CASE WHEN c.certi_name LIKE '%정보처리기사%' THEN 10000 WHEN c.certi_name LIKE '%컴퓨터활용능력%1급%' THEN 9999 WHEN c.certi_name LIKE '%컴퓨터활용능력%2급%' THEN 9998 WHEN c.certi_name LIKE '%정보보안기사%' THEN 9997 WHEN c.certi_name LIKE '%임베디드기능관리사%' THEN 9996 ELSE COUNT(s.saved_id) END DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT c.certi_id AS certi_id, c.certi_name AS certi_name, MIN(e.reg_end_date) AS deadline, TRUNC(MIN(e.reg_end_date)) - TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS d_day FROM exam_schedule e JOIN certification c ON c.certi_name = e.cert_id WHERE e.reg_end_date IS NOT NULL AND e.reg_end_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) GROUP BY c.certi_id, c.certi_name ORDER BY MIN(e.reg_end_date) ASC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_ING (ING_ID, USER_ID, TARGET_ID, TARGET_TYPE, STATUS) VALUES (USER_ING_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{param1}, #{param2}, #{param3}, 0)
